title: Almost Vanilla Mushrooms
body:
# Almost Vanilla Mushrooms
**_THIS IS PART OF ALMOST VANILLA PLANTS (work in progress)_**
##
### About?
The Minecraft mushrooms are a little boring. I tried to "fix" then giving it some unique and recognizable shapes in 3D, even though, the objective is to maintain the classic style of Minecraft.
##
### What exactly changed?
All mushrooms models in 3D:
- Red Mushrooms in groups.
- Brown Mushrooms in pairs.
- Warped Fungus in pairs.
- Crimson Fungus solo.

Item versions in 3D.
  
All potted version models in 3D.

Mushroom block with more randomness.
##
![Every mushroom feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a215337f7313fe6cd65758f293eeed5d4db1663_0.webp)
_More images on gallery!_
## 
### General questions
**[1] Can I use it for my projects?:** sure, just give the credits if it is public.

**[2] Can you make it for older versions?:** never, I have no idea how to make it, but if someone wants to, do it (with credits)

**[3] Will it be updated?:** probably

**[4] Any mod support?:** none, for now at least 
## 
### Contact
Bug reports, tips, requests, or anything else: almostdelled@gmail.com
